title: Graphics
purpose: `graphics.vitl` is a public stdlib surface inside the `stdlib` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: Top-level map of the Vitte standard library and the responsibilities owned by each family.
use_cases: Filesystem or process interaction goes through `path`, `io`, `os`, or `sysinfo`.
Explicit runtime coordination goes through `async`, `threading`, `kernel`, or `ffi`.
